hooks.command: echo '🧭 continuous-learning: end each completed task with a learn: line — "learn: none", or if a tool/API/workflow behaved unexpectedly and it changes future approach: "learn: [slug] surprise → what to change" (then mem_save it: text=that line, label=the bare slug, tagged continuous-learning; dedup via mem_search first; skip silently if memory is unavailable). No status fields, no instance specifics (hosts/IPs/paths/tokens) — abstract to technique. Run /learn to promote accumulated findings into this project'\''s own docs — see the continuous-learning skill.'
